description: Quarterly certificate showing compliance with DSCR and leverage covenants
parsed_text:
COMPLIANCE CERTIFICATE
Certificate Date: April 30, 2026
Reporting Period Ended: March 31, 2026
Borrower: Prairie Ridge Manufacturing LLC
Lender: Heartland Bank, N.A.
Reference: Loan Agreement dated March 15, 2026
The undersigned certifies that Borrower is in compliance with all financial covenants and no Default or Event of Default exists.
Minimum DSCR Required: 1.25x
Actual DSCR: 1.42x
Maximum Debt/EBITDA Required: 3.25x
Actual Debt/EBITDA: 2.80x
Minimum Liquidity Required: $750,000
Actual Liquidity: $1,600,000
Minimum Net Worth Required: $5,000,000
Actual Net Worth: $6,300,000
Exceptions/Waivers: None
Financial statements attached: Yes
Signed: Elena Morris, Chief Financial Officer
